languages.original_text: "Excessive impulsiveness often leads to dire consequences. Alas, but you will have to drink from this bitter cup of experience more than once or twice, Sister Argenta."

languages.text: "Чрезмерная импульсивность зачастую приводит к плачевным последствиям. Увы, но эту чашу горького опыта вам придется испить еще не раз и не два, сестра Арджента".
"Excessive impulsiveness often leads to dire consequences. Alas, but you will have to drink from this bitter cup of experience more than once or twice, Sister Argenta."
languages.original_text: "Чрезмерная импульсивность зачастую приводит к плачевным последствиям. Увы, но эту чашу горького опыта вам придется испить еще не раз и не два, сестра Арджента".

traits.locale_text: "Excessive impulsiveness often leads to dire consequences. Alas, but you will have to drink from this bitter cup of experience more than once or twice, Sister Argenta."
"Excessive impulsiveness often leads to dire consequences. Alas, but you will have to drink from this bitter cup of experience more than once or twice, Sister Argenta."
"Excessive impulsiveness often leads to dire consequences. Alas, but you will have to drink from this bitter cup of experience more than once or twice, Sister Argenta."

languages.text: «La impulsividad excesiva suele tener consecuencias graves. Es una lástima, pero tendrá que tragarse este amargo vaso de experiencia más de una vez, hermana Argenta».
languages.original_text: "Excessive impulsiveness often leads to dire consequences. Alas, but you will have to drink from this bitter cup of experience more than once or twice, Sister Argenta."

traits.locale_text: «La impulsividad excesiva suele tener consecuencias graves. Es una lástima, pero tendrá que tragarse este amargo vaso de experiencia más de una vez, hermana Argenta».

languages.text: 「過度の衝動性は、しばしば悲惨な結果を招きます。残念ながら、あなたはこの苦い経験の杯を、一度や二度ならず飲み干さねばならないでしょう、シスター・アルジェンタ」
languages.original_text: "Excessive impulsiveness often leads to dire consequences. Alas, but you will have to drink from this bitter cup of experience more than once or twice, Sister Argenta."

traits.locale_text: 「過度の衝動性は、しばしば悲惨な結果を招きます。残念ながら、あなたはこの苦い経験の杯を、一度や二度ならず飲み干さねばならないでしょう、シスター・アルジェンタ」

languages.text: “鲁莽之举必将招致惨重后果。遗憾的是，阿洁塔修女，恐怕你注定要反复啜饮这杯名为‘阅历’的苦涩杯盏了。”
languages.original_text: "Excessive impulsiveness often leads to dire consequences. Alas, but you will have to drink from this bitter cup of experience more than once or twice, Sister Argenta."

traits.locale_text: “鲁莽之举必将招致惨重后果。遗憾的是，阿洁塔修女，恐怕你注定要反复啜饮这杯名为‘阅历’的苦涩杯盏了。”

languages.text: "Übermäßige Impulsivität hat oft unerfreuliche Folgen. Es ist ein Jammer, aber Ihr werdet Euch dieser bitteren Erkenntnis nicht nur einmal stellen müssen, Schwester Argenta."
languages.original_text: "Excessive impulsiveness often leads to dire consequences. Alas, but you will have to drink from this bitter cup of experience more than once or twice, Sister Argenta."

traits.locale_text: "Übermäßige Impulsivität hat oft unerfreuliche Folgen. Es ist ein Jammer, aber Ihr werdet Euch dieser bitteren Erkenntnis nicht nur einmal stellen müssen, Schwester Argenta."

languages.text: « L'excès d'impulsivité a souvent de terribles conséquences. Hélas, vous en ferez l'amère expérience plus d'une fois, Sœur Argenta. »
languages.original_text: "Excessive impulsiveness often leads to dire consequences. Alas, but you will have to drink from this bitter cup of experience more than once or twice, Sister Argenta."

traits.locale_text: « L'excès d'impulsivité a souvent de terribles conséquences. Hélas, vous en ferez l'amère expérience plus d'une fois, Sœur Argenta. »

languages.text: "Aşırı dürtüsellik, genellikle vahim sonuçlara yol açar. Ne yazık ki bu acı tecrübe kadehinden bir ya da iki defadan daha çok içmek zorunda kalacaksın Rahibe Argenta."
languages.original_text: "Excessive impulsiveness often leads to dire consequences. Alas, but you will have to drink from this bitter cup of experience more than once or twice, Sister Argenta."
